form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently scored a big 7 len win at this track April 8 over 1900m defeating Alperin Oglu with 58kg at $4.90. The start before that 3rd of 7 at this track on April 1 over 1200m, 6 len behind Bay Wind carrying 58kg at $3.45. No reason he cannot build on that success.

form.formComment: Last start 6th of 9 at Sanliurfa on March 30 over 1300m, 24 len behind King Of The Field with 56kg at $4.95. The start before that 4th in a small field at Sanliurfa on March 18 over 2000m, 17 len behind Korkmaz Kardesler carrying 60kg at $3.15. Genuine chance this time around.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7). Last start 6th of 9 at Sanliurfa on March 30 over 1300m, 24 len behind King Of The Field with 56kg at $4.95. The start before that 4th in a small field at Sanliurfa on March 18 over 2000m, 17 len behind Korkmaz Kardesler carrying 60kg at $3.15. Genuine chance this time around.

form.formComment: Comes off a 42 day let-up. At the latest run 9th of 11 at Sanliurfa on March 4 over 1900m, 57 len behind Korkmaz Kardesler with 55kg at $38.40. The start before that 8th of 17 at Sanliurfa on February 25 over 1200m, 12 len behind Mete Koc Bey with 55kg at $17.55. Well held last time and facing tough task today.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5.5). Comes off a 42 day let-up. At the latest run 9th of 11 at Sanliurfa on March 4 over 1900m, 57 len behind Korkmaz Kardesler with 55kg at $38.40. The start before that 8th of 17 at Sanliurfa on February 25 over 1200m, 12 len behind Mete Koc Bey with 55kg at $17.55. Well held last time and facing tough task today.

form.formComment: Last start scored a big 6 len win at this track April 1 over 1500m defeating Duzce Aslani with 56kg at $4.85. The race before that second last in a small field at Antalya on March 3 over 2000m, 22 len behind Lion Stone with 56.5kg at $26.10. Racing well and can win again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Last start scored a big 6 len win at this track April 1 over 1500m defeating Duzce Aslani with 56kg at $4.85. The race before that second last in a small field at Antalya on March 3 over 2000m, 22 len behind Lion Stone with 56.5kg at $26.10. Racing well and can win again.

form.formComment: Resuming today after a break of six months. Finished off last preparation by 0.4 len this track October 8 over 1500m defeating Mert Pasa with 58kg at $4.25. Previously first up; ran last of 11 at Veliefendi July 16 over 1200m, 70 len behind Runaway With Me with 57kg at $16.10. Has plenty of scope for improvement this time in work.
